title: COOS COUNTY CRISIS LINE - 211info
text: COOS HEALTH AND WELLNESS COOS COUNTY CRISIS LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support for people experiencing mental health issues, thoughts of suicide, or other crises. A mobile response team can be activated by contacting the crisis line. 281 LaClair Street Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 266-6800 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Crisis Line (541) 266-6800 Text Short Code 988 National Crisis And Suicide Line Toll-free (888) 543-5763 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for crisis services FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Coos County Services: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines In Person Crisis Intervention Mental Health Crisis Lines Suicide Prevention Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - COOS COUNTY HEALTH AND WELLNESS BEHAVIORAL HEALTH PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
